narrative:
Precinct Urbana 4-A (precinct in Champaign County) has 785 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
